heading: Savings clause
label: 3005 Savings clause
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the Secretary of the Interior and the Secretary of Agriculture shall continue to manage public lands under the principles of multiple use and sustained yield in accordance with the Federal Land Policy and Management Act of 1976 ( et seq.) or the Forest and Rangeland Renewable Resources Planning Act of 1974 ( et seq.), respectively, including for due consideration of mineral and nonrenewable energy-related projects and other nonrenewable energy uses, for the purposes of land use planning, permit processing, and conducting environmental reviews.43 U.S.C. 170116 U.S.C. 1600
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle B (§§ 3101–3106) of title III of div.
